title: Compara
overview: Collaborated with three teammates to design and develop an MVP for a comparison tool using Nuxt, Vue, and MongoDB. The platform allows researchers to create and publish studies--where participants compare images, videos, audio, and text.
about: The target audience for the website was teenagers aged 14 to 16...

title: Twitter Clone
overview: Partnered with another developer to build a Twitter-style app using Python, React, and TypeScript, implementing core social features with testing. We built an API supporting CRUD functionality for users, posts, follows, and search.
about: This project was a collaborative effort with two classmates...

title: N/A
Overview: We were tasked to create a website for UN's Sustainable Development Goal 13: Climate Action with focus on responsiveness for both desktop and mobile with HTML and CSS. The objective was to create a design and message that would've engage a specific age group to advocate for the planet.
about: The target audience for the website was teenagers aged 14 to 16...
